Perched majestically on a picturesque hilltop, amid floating clouds, Silk Path Grand Sapa Resort & Spa offers an exceptional blend of local culture, French Indochina architecture, and vibrant Sapa touches. The resort's refined style features 152 superb rooms. Each room features a private balcony that seamlessly connects you to nature, inviting you to step outside and be mesmerized by breathtaking views of the majestic Hoang Lien Son Mountain Range.

Start your day with a delectable breakfast at Samu, where stunning mountain views become the backdrop for a delicious spread of refined Vietnamese cuisine, infused with the unique flavors of the Northwest region and various healthy food. As the sun dips below the horizon, Olivio invites you to unwind by its mesmerizing outdoor firepit, its rose garden fragrance mingling with the crisp mountain air. Savor authentic Italian specialties and a selection of European favorites, all crafted with fresh, local ingredients. Whether you seek a casual lunch with friends or an elegant dinner for two, our restaurants cater to every desire. And for those seeking a lighter touch, Then Yard & 1500 Cafe welcomes you with delightful hi-teas and premium drinks, the perfect accompaniment to witnessing the captivating sunrises and sunsets.

The indoor heated pool offers not only a refreshing respite but also a spectacular panorama of the surrounding mountains. At Chi Spa, the renowned spa in Sapa, indulge in the signature Red Dao herbal bathing, a unique treatment that adds an extra layer of wellness and luxury to your stay, transforming each moment into an exquisite and rejuvenating retreat.

Fansipan Mountain is 0.6 mi from Silk Path Grand Sapa Resort & Spa, while Sa Pa Lake is 2953 feet away. Complimentary pick-up service from Sapa Stone Church to the hotel is provided.

name: Victoria Chau Doc Hotel
address: 1 Le Loi Street, Chau Doc Town, Chau Doc, Vietnam
description:
Set on the banks of the Bassac River, Victoria Chau Doc Hotel offers cozy accommodations with river views. The hotel also features views of the famous floating markets and floating fish farming villages, as well as Cham villages. Guests can enjoy a dip in the outdoor pool, or enjoy a meal at the on-site restaurant.

All rooms and suites are elegantly furnished and feature large windows offering plenty of natural lights. A cable flat-screen TV and mini-bar are included for your convenience. Certain rooms are fitted with a private balcony. Private bathroom is equipped with shower facility and slippers.

The hotel’s Victoria Spa is ideally located on the rooftop terrace and contains 5 massage beds with tranquil and beautiful views over the Bassac River. Staff at the 24-hour front desk can assist you with a variety of services, including currency exchange, luggage storage, bicycle rentals and other concierge services.

Located in the Mekong Delta, Victoria Chau Doc Hotel is a 3-hour drive from Can Tho and less than a 5-hour drive from Phnom Penh. Ho Chi Minh City is 168 mi away, which takes approximately 7 hours by car. Transport services can be arranged by the hotel staff.

The in-house Bassac Restaurant serves Vietnamese and European cuisines.

With two decades of experience and a warm, welcoming atmosphere, Tung Trang Hotel offers a reliable and convenient base for exploring Hanoi.

name: Vinpearl Resort & Spa Phu Quoc
address: Bai Dai, Ganh Dau, Ganh Dau, Phú Quốc, Vietnam
description:
"Welcoming guests with its bright red tiles, Indochine-style architecture and an outdoor swimming pool of nearly 5,000 square yards embracing the resort's premises, Vinpearl Resort  &  Spa Phu Quoc offers an experi-ence journey full of characteristic natural flavors of the pearl island. That's walking on the beach while watching the brilliant "party of lights" on the horizon, the feeling of refreshment and cooling down immediately when setting foot on the green premises here after a long day of exploring, or relaxing on a lazy chair to  watch a family favorite movie at the beach cinema. Unmissable experiences here include savoring a seafood buffet with live music and magnificent sunset views at Pepper restaurant by the sea, and enjoying a unique Balinese massage at a spa hut on the tranquil."

Boasting an outdoor pool and a private beach area, Vinpearl Resort & Spa Phu Quoc features modern and luxurious accommodations with free WiFi access throughout the property. It has a 24-hour front desk, business center and meeting/banquet facilities.

Strategically located, the resort is 29 mi from Tranh Waterfall and 23 mi from Ham Ninh Fishing Village. Phu Quoc International Airport is accessible within a 21 mi drive.

Elegantly furnished, air-conditioned rooms are equipped with a wardrobe, in-room safe, a mini-bar, seating area and a flat-screen TV with cable channels. The private bathroom includes shower facility, hairdryer and free toiletries.

Indulge in a pampering massage at the spa, or enjoy a session of karaoke on site. Luggage storage, ticketing and laundry services are also available, while car rentals, airport transfers and shuttle services can be arranged at a surcharge.

Housing three restaurants, guests will be served with a delectable spread of local and Western cuisines. After-meal drinks can be enjoyed at the bar, while room service options are provided for guests’ convenience.

Note: With the announcement of the Kien Giang Tourism Department, all passengers arriving in Phu Quoc need to have a negative Covid-19 test result within 24 hours. Therefore, please conduct the test and show the test results when you come to check-in at Vinpearl.

Extra bed and Surcharge:
All children are welcome and surcharge following policy:
Infants from 0- 3 years old stay for free if sharing room with parents.
Children from 4 years old- Additional charges will applied.
Guests from 12 years old are considered as adults.
-Only one extra bed for one room. Villa room does not have extra bed. Children under 12 years old are not allowed to share existing beds with parents. An extra bed is mandatory for any additional child.
-Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
-Guests are required to provide accurate and complete occupancy details, including the number of adults and children, to ensure correct pricing.
-Any undeclared or additional guests will be subject to applicable surcharges at check-in in accordance with the hotel’s policy.
In details:
- Hotel room (Deluxe, Junior Suite… room types) only 02 adults included room rate, maximum 2 children allowed per room and an additional charge will apply for children from 4 years and over. Guests from 11 years of age are considered as adults.
- Villa 3 Bedroom type: only 06 adults are included room rate, a maximum of 6 children allowed per villa, and an additional charge will apply for children from 4 years and over. Guests from 11 years of age are considered as adults.
Each room/villa type and promotion will apply a different surcharge. Please contact the property directly for more information.
-Villa Room only supplies King bed.

Standard policy:
•According to the requirements under Vietnamese law, guests are required to present their photo identification, passport or birth certificate of every passenger upon check-in.
•Guests are responsible for self-checking room furnishing and facilities, food/drinks in mini-bar upon check-in and check- out as per regulations of the Hotel.
•For any changes to the reservation, guests are required to inform the property at least 7 working days prior to check-in.
•Kindly present children's birth certificate(s) upon check-in. If children's birth certificates are not provided, their age will be converted based on their height.
• Full-board meals will begin with dinner on the day of check-in, and end with lunch on the day of check- out. Should you wish to have lunch on your arrival date instead of departure date, please inform the property at least 5 days in advance. This meal-change option is only available for arrival before 13:00 and departure before 12:00. Changing meal options on arrival day is not possible.
• Room rates on [31 December] not include a gala dinner. There will be a compulsory fee applied for Christmas and New Year Gala Dinner- Which does not include room rate and should be collected at property as Vinpearl Policy.
• Hotel Credit only used for all services provided by the hotel (without using external providers) for examples: F&B, Spa treatment (not massage), Laundry, Car rental service provided by the hotel… Bar drinks (alcoholic beverages not applicable) / Room Service not applicable; / Do not use hotel credit to buy room-related services: Buy more rooms, upgrade view, room class, additional surcharges...
• The room rate does not include tickets to VinWonders and Safari.
• Customers need to provide the flight number (such as VJ975, VJ979 …) & contact at least 48 hours prior arrival date for complimentary airport transfer by shuttle bus arrangement. In case we do not receive the above required information, we understand that you arrange the transportation to our hotel by yourself.
• When using Vinpearl’s services, guests consent to the property’s use of the photographs taken for statistics. These photographs will not be disclosed to third parties outside Vingroup.
• A deposit is required upon check-in for additional services or damages during the stay and will be refunded upon departure. Deposit only in VND.

RESORT REGULATIONS:
To contribute to a civilized resort environment, please comply with the following regulations:
-The standard check-in time is at 15:00. Please arrange the schedule to arrive after this time to avoid waiting, especially during peak period in summer & weekend.
-Outside food/drinks are not allowed. Please inform front desk if brought, fee applies VND 1,175,000/time. Hotel will not be responsible for related safety.
-Do not bring fruits with a strong smell (such as durians, jackfruit, fish sauce, etc) into the hotel room. Surcharge will be apply for outside beverages:
• Spirit: 687.500 VND/ 750ml
• Wine: 500.000 VND/ 750ml
• Beer: 375.000 VND/ box
• Local liquor: 375.000 VND/ l.
When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.
Please present the same credit card used to guarantee your booking when checking in / making payment at the hotel. If you are making payment using another cardholder's credit card, kindly provide the following to the hotel prior to your arrival: 1) Authorization letter with cardholder's signature 2) Copy of the cardholder's card (front and back of card with cardholder's signature) Please note that hotel may contact the cardholder for verification purposes.

name: Silk Path Grand Sapa Resort & Spa
address: Doi Quan 6, Group 10, Sapa, Lao Cai, Sapa, Vietnam
description:
Perched majestically on a picturesque hilltop, amid floating clouds, Silk Path Grand Sapa Resort & Spa offers an exceptional blend of local culture, French Indochina architecture, and vibrant Sapa touches. The resort's refined style features 152 superb rooms. Each room features a private balcony that seamlessly connects you to nature, inviting you to step outside and be mesmerized by breathtaking views of the majestic Hoang Lien Son Mountain Range.

Start your day with a delectable breakfast at Samu, where stunning mountain views become the backdrop for a delicious spread of refined Vietnamese cuisine, infused with the unique flavors of the Northwest region and various healthy food. As the sun dips below the horizon, Olivio invites you to unwind by its mesmerizing outdoor firepit, its rose garden fragrance mingling with the crisp mountain air. Savor authentic Italian specialties and a selection of European favorites, all crafted with fresh, local ingredients. Whether you seek a casual lunch with friends or an elegant dinner for two, our restaurants cater to every desire. And for those seeking a lighter touch, Then Yard & 1500 Cafe welcomes you with delightful hi-teas and premium drinks, the perfect accompaniment to witnessing the captivating sunrises and sunsets.

The indoor heated pool offers not only a refreshing respite but also a spectacular panorama of the surrounding mountains. At Chi Spa, the renowned spa in Sapa, indulge in the signature Red Dao herbal bathing, a unique treatment that adds an extra layer of wellness and luxury to your stay, transforming each moment into an exquisite and rejuvenating retreat.

Fansipan Mountain is 0.6 mi from Silk Path Grand Sapa Resort & Spa, while Sa Pa Lake is 2953 feet away. Complimentary pick-up service from Sapa Stone Church to the hotel is provided.

The hotel also features views of the famous floating markets and floating fish farming villages, as well as Cham villages. The in-house Bassac Restaurant serves Vietnamese and European cuisines.
